description: Style NoteWhat could make you look better than a nice pair of heels while wearing a dress or a skirt? In fact, people wear heels even with jeans and it looks amazing. A nice pair of heels from catwalk is just what you need.Product DetailsPeep toed heel with a strap at the forefoot and a metal detailFaux snake hide pattern on the strap with a beige footbedTPR outsole and heel capHeel: 3& rdquo Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
